standards.title: Secretarial Standard on Meetings of the Board of Directors (SS-1)
standards.issuedBy: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
standards.lastAmended: Last amended with effect from October 1, 2017
standards.summary: Prescribes guidelines for convening and conducting meetings of the Board of Directors, including notice period (minimum 7 days), agenda preparation, quorum requirements, and recording of minutes.

standards.title: Secretarial Standard on General Meetings (SS-2)
standards.issuedBy: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
standards.lastAmended: Last amended with effect from October 1, 2017
standards.summary: Governs the conduct of General Meetings (AGM/EGM) of companies, including notice periods (minimum 21 clear days), voting processes, proxy appointments, and preparation and signing of minutes.

standards.title: Secretarial Standard on Report of the Board of Directors (SS-4)
standards.issuedBy: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
standards.summary: Establishes standard practices for disclosures and reporting in the Board's Report, promoting transparency in governance, financial statements, internal control systems, and CSR activities.
